name: hicar-mcp
description: AI-queryable knowledge of the HICAR atmospheric model: namelist options, physics schemes, variable catalog, docs and code.
long_description: Exposes every HICAR namelist option (with types, defaults, allowed values and ranges), the physics-scheme registry, the ~375-variable output catalog, the documentation, and source/semantic code search. Ships with pre-extracted knowledge so it works with zero configuration; set HICAR_REPO for source-aware tools.

hicar_repo.title: HICAR repository (optional)
hicar_repo.description: Path to a HICAR checkout to enable live/source-aware mode. Leave empty to use bundled knowledge.
